chunks.memory_unit_text: In the langfuse/langfuse release v3.156.0, the team delivered performance improvements by reducing scan size for event properties, parallelizing dual write inserts, and enabling ClickHouse query condition cache for analytics queries. New features include mapping I/O to pydantic root spans, handling thinking parts in playground/evals, showing full trace data on hover at small row height, adding a top banner for UI v4, including triggering user info in webhook and GitHub dispatch payloads, adding definition version tracking to dashboard widgets, parsing LiveKit attributes on OTel spans, supporting tokenEndpointAuthMethod in multi-tenant SSO configs, and allowing extraHeaders for the Anthropic adapter. Fixes addressed model-prices Claude version identifier, dashboard metricsVersion passing, filter URL roundtrip decoding, missing observation columns in eval CTE, API scores returning executionTraceId, Docker Redis named volume, and project membership RBAC gating.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the langfuse/langfuse release v3.157.0, the team renamed total cost to cost in the events table, fixed REDIS_KEY_PREFIX handling for BullMQ compatibility, moved legacy public API endpoints to a separate namespace, reduced memory usage and fixed double quoting in CSV exports, added gpt-5.4 model support, showed trace level scores in observation level score table, dropped invalid filter columns on frontend switch, default hid LLM as a judge environments in filters, allowed users to filter from trace detail view, refined annotation queue nullable vs optional spec, implemented saved views sliding from left, increased parsing depth for variable extraction in evals, loaded filter options based on events table if v4 enabled, documented Codex environment setup and bootstrap scripts, added type filter to default-expanded events table, and enabled public private setting of events.

* build: add new deployment region by @Stef...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the langfuse/langfuse release v3.158.0, features included eval config blocking, media and blob batch cleaner for project deletion, allowing members to edit LLM tools, adding unresolved fetches to the v2 prompts API, blob storage integration status endpoint with error tracking, an intro dialog for Fast (Preview) toggle, fulltext search across message windows in playground/prompts, and changing v4 beta to preview. Fixes and improvements covered OTel metadata handling, nullIf handling in v4 queries, filtering generations related to a prompt, parsing chat prompts references correctly, validating filter type compatibility, batch export with categorical score filter, evaluator target filtering, eval org owner fallback, preventing BlobStorageIntegrationProcessing requeue deadlocks, normalizing leaked orderBy time aliases, lazy loading evaluator job execution counts, updating eval UI callout link, OTel metadata flattening, renaming span to observation latencies, and nicer dashboard formatting. Chores included tracking v4BetaEnabled flag on PostHog, renaming frontend toggle to preview, making beta toggle public, promoting faster dashboards on home, extracting shared media deletion utilities, and adding a new deployment region.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the langfuse/langfuse release v3.160.0, fixes applied next base path to URL in eval templates, showed alert if variable mapping drifts between template and config, split IO columns into separate CTE to reduce memory usage in traces, never applied default view if table controls are hidden in evals, sent email to project admins on blob storage export failure, wrote attributes to metadata in direct write and S3 evals write for non-langfuse-SDK spans, fixed event metadata scope missing in OTel, deduplicated redundant metadata keys consistently in events, and reduced Prisma OTEL span noise via ignoreSpanTypes. chunks.memory_unit_text: In the langfuse/langfuse release v3.161.0, features inserted directly into events_full table, added support for gpt-5.4-mini and gpt-5.4-nano models, supported Genkit spans in OTel pipeline, auto-created default spend alerts on new subscriptions for billing, and supported categorical LLM-as-a-judge outputs in evals. Chores included API key colon assertion test, accepting createdAt param in dataset-run-items POST, moving received metrics query log to debug, adding ChatMLAdapter test cases, allowing vscode debugger break point setting, removing cross-env dep, and upgrading to nextjs 16.2.

Repository: langfuse/langfuse
Release: v3.162.0
Tag: v3.162.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-24T15:28:17Z; created_at: 2026-03-24T15:27:13Z
